'''Malanose''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Gree Enclave/Legends|Gree Enclave]], on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], which served as the primary world containing the [[Crafter]] and [[Researcher]] castes of the [[Gree (species)/Legends|Gree]] civilization.

==Description==
The planet Malanose was located in the Gree Enclave of the Outer Rim Territories. Several lesser-known [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace routes]] connected it to [[Asation]], [[Gree/Legends|Gree]], and [[Te Hasa/Legends|Te Hasa]] elsewhere in the Enclave.<ref name="TGE" />

The average day on Malanose was 18 standard hours, with 320 local days encompassing a year.<ref name="TGE" />

==History==
During the high days of Gree society, Malanose was covered with [[City/Legends|cities]] that would produce new devices and technologies. As their society suffered in the decline, the remaining structures were raided for any remaining artifacts, and transported to other planets in the Gree Enclave. Only the largest of relics were left behind in the abandoned cities, which include the [[Totth'k Lotos]].<ref name="TGE" />

The ruins of Gree [[hypergate]]s were left on Malanose, among other worlds.<ref name="TGE" />
